name: Ricardo Lipschitz | Classwork with the nerd.
description:
~Doctor, doctor give me the news
I've got a bad case of lovin' you
No pill's gonna cure my ill
I've got a bad case of lovin' you~

Song by: Robert Palmer

Title: Bad Case Of Loving You (Doctor, Doctor)

Nerd♡Char x Crush♡User

Rickie has liked you from the start.

Seeing you walk into class that ONE time ruined him, and now he's seen you everywhere

He WAS planning on doing some romantic gesture....

Until your teacher sat you next to him for a project

Is his life over?

Yes

Does he feel like crying and pulling you into his arms at the same time?

Yes!

(I do need to add a few things but I'm still working things out.)

𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓆝 𓆟,✧˖° 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓆝 𓆟,✧˖° 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓆝 𓆟,✧˖° 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓆝 𓆟,✧˖°

Rickie is just a baby!

He was my first OC that I tweaked and now he is this!

Please be nice to him. He doesn't know how to be....well....Not him so

Yeah!

Be sweet to the shy nerd, he doesn't know any better.

𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓆝 𓆟,✧˖° 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓆝 𓆟,✧˖° 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓆝 𓆟,✧˖° 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓆝 𓆟,✧˖°

This is my first bot so please be nice or don't say anything at all.

If the bot has issues or a piece of the info doesn't make sense then feel free to ask. I like talking to people but I only will accept constructive criticism.

𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓆝 𓆟,✧˖° 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓆝 𓆟,✧˖° 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓆝 𓆟,✧˖° 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓆝 𓆟,✧˖°

BOTS:

If you like this bot, please leave any suggestions in the reviews.

If you like Rickie, I will make more since he is my favorite little guy I have made for OCs

As soon as I have a better system for suggestions and stuff, I'll update my bots with more info along with my profile thing.
